name: zinput_init
description: zInput::Init initializes DirectInput state, creates keyboard, mouse, and joystick devices, records status flags, and acquires keyboard/mouse polling references.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Init@zInput@@YIHPAX0@Z at 0x471b50 still fails: 3 unmasked mismatches, 84 relocation bytes masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 182 bytes, VC object symbol size 192 bytes.

Reviewed difference is final pop esi / xor eax scheduling in the success epilogue. The success path crosses the real DirectInputCreateA provider boundary; direct device initialization behavior is covered by the accepted keyboard, mouse, joystick, and AddRef callee targets.
